en: I really seem to be getting, uh, pregnanter these days.
ko: 요즘 정말 임신할 것 같은 기분이 들어.

en: You know, I set up this whole private adoption,
ko: 나 이 모든 개인 입양을 준비했어.

en: and this married couple in, like, St. Cloud,
ko: 그리고 세인트 클라우드에 있는 한 부부가 부모가 될 거야.

en: they're going to be the parents. Really? Yeah.
Well, I mean, the guy, he's awesome.
His name's Mark, and, um, he likes old horror movies,
ko: 이름은 마크고, 음, 옛날 공포 영화를 좋아해.

en: We actually hung out this afternoon.
Listen, I talked to, uh, Dad and Bran,
and they said they wouldn't arc you out to your folks, so... Okay.
ko: 그들이 너를 부모님께 알리지 않겠다고 했어, 그래서... 좋아.

en: I think we should be cool, you know?
You know, I'm going to start looking like a pretty big dork soon, so...
ko: 곧 정말 큰 괴짜처럼 보일 것 같아서...

en: Are you still going to think I'm cute when I'm huge?
ko: 내가 커지면 여전히 나를 귀엽게 생각할 거야?
